hero_subtitle: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions, customer data, and wallet activity into a structured audit trail to support defensible compliance review for CASPs.

problem_title: Travel Rule records become hard to trace
problem_description: Compliance teams at CASPs struggle to maintain clear and consistent audit trails when Travel Rule messages and exceptions are handled in isolated systems. This fragmentation makes it difficult to link originator and beneficiary data with case workflows and regulatory evidence for review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions and provider outputs into structured case workflows that preserve audit-ready evidence for CASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to evidence
workflow_description: SFTY manages Travel Rule messages by routing exceptions into structured cases, preserving audit evidence and preparing compliance reports for CASP review and oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for CASP Travel Rule operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status and exceptions into one structured compliance workflow tailored for CASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes Travel Rule exceptions into case workflows for manual review and tracks resolution status with linked audit evidence for compliance teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting documents as audit-ready evidence for Travel Rule events to support regulatory reviews and internal inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates data from multiple Travel Rule providers without replacing them, consolidating outputs into a connected compliance layer for CASPs.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers for CASPs?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, case management and audit-ready records.
final_title: Build evidence-grade Travel Rule records for CASPs
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions, cases and audit evidence into one controlled compliance workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
